name: Swedish Flatbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend together the flours, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. Stir in the buttermilk and fennel seeds with a fork until just combined.
4. Shape into small balls and roll on a floured board to make very thin rounds, about four to five inches in diameter.
5. Bake on ungreased sheets at 375°F for five minutes or until light brown.
